entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.2
entry.content: ### Woohoo! Just what I needed! ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.2) * Probably not compatible with ongoing games ## Changes * Implemented DeathLink * Stars can nullify one death signal at a time * Hearts can also nullify one death signal if desired * DeathLink, EnergyLink and TrapLink can now be toggled in the Manager at any time * Potentially fixes Yoshi House's goal forcing a ton of eggs being panic swap targeted * Fixes alternate logic being all messed up in Universal Tracker * Fixes some unusual cases where exits will be reported as reachable out of logic in UT * Fixes boos hurting Mario while ducking or when having an active star and riding Yoshi * Fixes locations other than exits having wrong classifications on levels with swapped exits * Run no longer displays an A in the in-game tracker * Goal location is now an event * Removed `swap_level_exits` option, it stopped mattering a long time ago * Alternate Logic no longer has every setting on by default * Enemy Shuffle updates: * FoI4 now guarantees a bouncing koopa after the midway point * VoB2 no longer has Dino Rhinos on the first room * VoB2 no longer has bouncing american footballs in the third room * DS1 now has fishes after exiting the secondary room * Several logic updates I forgot to document

entry.title: Hunie Pop 2 v3.1.0
entry.content:
- (APWorld) Added options to set the min/max value for Food, Date Gifts, Girl Gifts and Arch Items in shop - (APWorld) Changed YMAL option "filler_item" from a number range to specific option choices - (APWorld) Changed Default Template option order so that relevant options are grouped together - (Client) Made Number of Items gotten on start screen properly reflect amount received - (Client) Fixed the last Arch Item in shop not being generated properly - (Client) Made Arch Items disappear from inventory after moving locations - (Client) Fixed random error in console on client start
BACKUP YOU ORIGINAL SAVE CANT GUARANTEE THAT IT WONT GET CORRUPTED Windows save location: "C:/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/AppData/LocalLow/HuniePot/HuniePop 2 - Double Date/" Mac save location: "/Users/{YOUR USERNAME}/Library/Application Support/com.HuniePot.HuniePop2-DoubleDate/" CLIENT INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Hunie Pop 2 Installed - Download Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin (See Releases for latest version) - Extract and copy the contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago plugin.zip" to the directory where "HuniePop 2 - Double Date.exe" is - play and connect to a Archipelago server APWORLD INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - Have Archipelago Launcher Installed (latest release found here: https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/latest ) - Download Huniepop 2 APWorld (See Releases for latest version) - Select "Install APWorld" in launcher and select Huniepop 2 APWorld you downloaded - Restart launcher for APWorld to properly install - (Optional but Recomended)Select "Generate Template Options" to generate default Huniepop 2 YMAL POPTRACKER INSTALLATION INSTRUCTIONS: - copy contents of "Hunie Pop 2 Archipelago PopTracker.zip" into the packs folder in the poptracker install directory

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.9.1
entry.content:
# Changelog - Removed multiple random enemy formations from the random pool. These include encounters that were inaccessible in a vanilla playthrough and encounters that only showed up in rogueport sewers after chapter 5 - Tweaked logic for some tattlesanity locations with random enemies in the sewers. - With enemy rando on, the changed fights in the sewers after beating ch.5 are now permanently inaccessible and not randomized - Some HP values have been tweaked for enemy scaling to better match the vanilla game - Randomized FP and BP is now weighted towards 3, making 0 and 6 less common. - Any badges or moves that cost 0 FP/BP respectively now stay at 0 BP/FP and are not included in the shuffle - Jolene can now be bribed. Setting names will change starting in v0.10.0 to not specify grubba - Apworld now has a proper manifest
# Bug Fixes - Fix a logic issue in ch.8 regarding the cog location not requiring yoshi or koops to access - Fix for crashes in chapter 3 related to enemy randomizer - Fix for nondescript crash on ROM boot related to shop item descriptions - Fix for yoshi egg continuing to follow you after getting the yoshi check in ch.3 - Fix for starting at rank 0 post-ch3, you will now start at 20 again after beating the chapter - Related to starting at rank 20 again after ch.3, the guard will now properly move out of the way for the minor league locker room - Fix for every encounter in ch.3 first striking you with enemy rando on - Fix for certain areas not having properly scaled stats, this could also crash your game on occasion
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jamesbrq/ArchipelagoTTYD/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.5.7
entry.content: - Fixed trap weights not working in options creator

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.1
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.1 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Updated custom title screen logo that follows the new V6 logo design - Custom language support now supports all UI # Changes - Archipelago Trap moodles now show a dynamic timer to when they will end - The Deadly Moodlesanity preset now contains Severe and Critical hypoxemia, Ventricular fibrillation, Palpitations, Circulatory collapse, Severe hypotension, Hypertensive crisis, Severe hypertension, and Toxic crisis [APWorld Change] - The Difficult Moodlesanity preset now contains Palpitations and Critical hypoxemia [APWorld Change] # Fixes - Fixed `Moodlesanity - Internal bleeding` not sending # Known Issues - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.0...v0.9.1

entry.title: Path of Exile v1.3.4
entry.content:
## Major bugfix
There was an issue where the response page for oauth was not rendering when zipping up into a `.apworld` "It worked on my machine!
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/stubobis1/Archipelago/compare/1.3.3...1.3.4

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.4
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.4
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIV v0.27.3
entry.content: * Fixed bug with Shadowbringers Alliance Raids. * Fixed rare generation bug when genning on source.

entry.title: Slime Rancher v0.3.0
entry.content: - [ApWorld] Reworked the entirety of the logic (thank sterlia for logic 2.0) - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `plortsanity` - Selling a plort for the first time will send a check - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `include_ogden` - Include Ogden's Retreat - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `include_mochi` - Include Mochi's Manor - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `include_viktor` - Include Viktor's Workshop - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `postgame` - Include Post-Credit Locations, i.e. Item Vaults - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `easy_skips` - Enable Skips that many new players end up finding on their first playthrough - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `precise_movement` - Enable Skips that require tighter movement than average - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `dangerous_skips` - Enable Skips that have a high chance of taking damage or getting killed - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `obscure_locations` - Enable Skips that abuse the terrain, usually in unintuitive ways - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `largo_jumps` - EnableSkips where you jump off a largo midair - [ApWorld] Added Yaml option `jetpack_boosts` - Enable Skips where you use the ability to get rid of jetpack's startup times through careful jumping, allowing for more energy conservation - [ApWorld] Changed how `treasure_cracker_checks` was checked - [Client] Added 2 missing note locations - [Client] You can no longer deposit quantum plorts for the Glass Desert teleporter if you don't have Glass Desert - Same goes for the ruins transition door: for honey plorts needing moss blanket, and for rad plorts needing indigo quarry - [Client] Cleaned up jetpack patch - [Client] Purchasing Newbucks will no longer cost Newbucks - [Client] Added a Note Tracker to the UI if you have the Note Goal - [Client] Made DeathLink/TrapLink check another thing to make sure it doesn't send when its not supposed to

entry.title: Universal Tracker v0.2.29
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Fix fuzzer hook not converting slot_data through json by @Mysteryem in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/130 * Default generation outcome to `OptionError` to ignore gen issues by @Eijebong in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/132 * [Universal Tracker] Implement user-defined tracker tab sorting by @Ars-Ignis in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/133 * Fix `/explain` with events, oops * show doc strings of the override functions (to allow worlds to tell users of what sub commands they provide) * Many many doc updates
## New Contributors * @Eijebong made their first contribution in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/132
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/compare/Tracker_v0.2.28...Tracker_v0.2.29

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.3
entry.content: Woohoo! 👀 ## Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.3) ## Changes * Fixed a broken rule * Updated Manager window with the correct name

entry.title: Universal Tracker v0.2.30
entry.content:
## What's Changed * remove deprecated arguments by @Ars-Ignis in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/134
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/compare/Tracker_v0.2.29...Tracker_v0.2.30

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.0a0
entry.content:
🚨Technically compatible with seeds generated in 0.8.3+, but all item models turn into the generic archipelago item model, the blue force gem.🚨
- [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md) - [FAQ and Credits](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/faq_and_credits.md) - [Tricks and Skips](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/tricks_and_skips.md)
## New Features - Swapped items from chests, NPC gifts and shops to actual items, with their models and text. - Some textboxes don't load in some rooms, and it's not implemented for freestanding items, buried items or salvage. - Multiworld items are represented by blue force gems when useful or progressive, and red force gems when filler or traps - Shop displays show their vanilla models, but you see the actual item after you buy them. - Changed Bellumbeck goal to be sent on final hit rather than credits - Added the following tricks glitched logic, found by Sweet: - Goron temple shovel skip - ToF 3F out of bounds - Gust South NW Chest with BCL and grapple - Added swordless Goron Temple to hard logic
## Bugfixes 🐛 - Boss doors no longer require room reloads to open. - Doors, spikes and flames toggled by crystals no longer repeat their cutscenes on room reload. - The big doors in TotOK still play their cutscenes, and the chest spawn on TotOK B8 also triggers repeated cutscenes until opened. - Prevented map warping while entering TotOK, which crashes - Fixed a goron chief post dungeon reward flag - Changed conflicting chests to reads on chest object open states - Prevented backwards mountain passage with cave rando from being in logic with less than 3 keys - Added Brant's Chamber Staircase to map tracker for IotD if houses are not randomized - Set a flag to prevent Jolene spawn when exiting ghost ship, or when in NW quadrant without ghost ship access - Figured out exactly what flags spawn/respawn multiple Oshus', and made sure exactly 1 always spawns - Prevented softlock on exiting fire temple without opening the door - Fixed client crash from faulty entrance data - Receiving items in rooms that use that item for location detection no longer sends that location for a bunch more locations.
## Behind the scenes - Updated to ap v0.6.7 - Updated to most recent shared client - Added flag filter for slot data at start - Switched to fast/slow processing in game methods - Added host game to multiworld item object data, allowing Spirit Tracks to model swap them - Some work has been done with rule builder, but not implemented yet

entry.title: shapez 2 v1.0.0
entry.content:
# Changelog
APWorld: - Made the apworld compatible with shapez 2 1.0 - Fixed the first 3 task lines sometimes having a (logically) impossible shape
Client: - First public version - Will be updated independently
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots? Manual-like client yes, back to 0.99.0 (will be deprecated soon though) First release of the client mod, so no backwards compatibility with that UT will probably be inaccurate for worlds generated prior to 1.0.0

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v70
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges)

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.0.post2
entry.content:
Origins is in a playable state, and has the vast majority of checks and save systems added to it. It's being marked as unstable until there's been more testing, polishing, and the rest of the checks are added. This means that existing checks may change in a future release.
**Reminder**: Download the correct mod file for your version of the game.
- **(New)** (Unstable) Origins Support: - Save System - See SAVE_SYSTEM.md in the repo - Checks: - 1, 3 and 6 Generators turned on - 1 and 4 Soul Boxes filled - Gramophone Player Part - Gramophone Blank Disc Part - 4 Elemental Disc Parts - 3 Shield Parts - 3 Maxis Drone Parts - 4 Checks per Staff (16 total) - Craft Staff - Puzzle 1 Complete - Puzzle 2 Complete - Upgraded Staff Charged - 6 Main Easter Egg Steps - 3 Music Easter Eggs - Staff Upgrade Checks (default on) - Enable checks when using Goal Round victory condition (always enabled in other modes) - New Checks: - Total Kill and Headshot checks per-map based on maximum rounds in logic: - Kills default on, Headshots default off - 8 Rounds - 75 K, 25 H - 12 Rounds - 150 K, 75 H - 16 Rounds - 300 K, 125 H - 22 Rounds - 500 K, 250 H - 30 Rounds - 1000 K, 400 H - Player statistics are now saved per-map, instead of per-seed. They are still kept after a game over. - Remove certain perk unlocks on maps without a wunderfizz or that use mechanics which bypass perk locks - This will likely come back in the form of new machine placements set by yaml in a later release - Fix Shadows of Evil being enabled if only Moon was set in the yaml

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Origins is now available on the Checks tab - Checks tab now only shows checks which are enabled on the seed - Fix extra check notifications showing for collected checks which weren't collected on your client, or were collected before a crash - Fix Origins Elemental Discs not being taken away properly after pickup

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Apworld bugfix only.
- Fix Gorod dragon wings check only being added when starting dragon wings is enabled - Fix lambda capture issue with kill / headshot logic rules

entry.title: Taskipelago v0.7
entry.content:
# Version 0.7 Support for boolean logic implemented
## Features, Improvements, and Changes * Boolean logic now added! You can now enter strings like 1, 2 && (3, 4 || 5, 6) into any field that accepts a list of tasks or rewards (goal tasks included!) * Merged pr from [@Dinknumberone](https://www.github.com/Dinknumberone) that adds an option to hide unreachable tasks

entry.title: Voltorb Flip v1.1.1
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Declared the Luck item as filler if artificial logic is turned off - Fixed incomplete manifest file
# Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots? Yes, back to 1.0.0

entry.title: Casualties: Unknown v0.9.2
entry.content:
### Casualties: Unknown Archipelago v0.9.2 This update is compatible with worlds generated on versions v0.9.0 and above!
For instructions on how to set up and play this mod, check the [README](https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/blob/master/README.md). Development on the Itch.io version of Casualties: Unknown has stopped. To play this mod on the Itch.io version, use CUAP v0.8.0.
# Additions - Support Casualties: Unknown V6.1 # Fixes - Elder Thornback Trap now properly times the Moodle change like before - Elder Thornback Trap now restores mood after the trap ends - Fixed Foliage, Water, and Climbing rope recipes expecting the wrong INT level to craft [APWorld Change] # Known Issues - Universal Tracker shows the wrong Moodles being in logic when Moodlesanity is set to Questboard - A NullReferenceException is sometimes thrown when the Layer Selector opens. This seems to be an issue with how Harmony interacts with Prefix patches on IEnumerators - If more than one Archipelago Item exists, they will all share the same sprite and description. This is a limitation of the original game, and will not be fixed - Craftsanity checks will still be sent if crafting fails due to low INT. This is a bug in the original game, and will not be fixed
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Nichologeam/CUAP/compare/v0.9.1...v0.9.2

entry.title: Refunct v1.0.2a0
entry.content: ## Version 1.0.2a - Mod update only, apworld&yaml are the same. - Fixed version mismatch issue. - Fixed game bug where all platforms are up after resetting at a specific. - Worked on the start-up crash, fixed now? (if not please send over the log right after it crashed! :D `Users\user\AppData\Local\Temp\refunct-tas.log`)

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v72
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges)

entry.title: Spyro 2 v2.0.0
entry.content:
This release modifies both the client (S2AP.Desktop.exe) and the APWorld. You must update both to use this version.
New Features: - BizHawk Support - Added support for BizHawk 2.9 and 2.10 via the Bizhawk Client. This provides a native Linux solution for playing S2AP. - Linux Duckstation Instructions - Added information about a Wine setup for Duckstation's Windows Portable release. - Trick Logic - Using either presets or by specifying individual tricks, players may tweak game logic to include things like proxies, double jumps, and swimming in air to access areas early. - For the full list of available options, see https://github.com/Uroogla/S2AP/wiki/Tricks-and-Presets - Generic Quality of Life Patch - The client is now capable of producing a modified .cue/.bin that fixes a couple of bugs. - This is not required, and the fixed bugs are very minor (e.g., removes undesirable Elora warps based on talisman count). - This works only from a .cue/.bin dump. - Option to reroute warps to Winter Tundra - When this option is enabled, either opening the door in Winter Tundra or collecting the orb along the wall will change the game such that warps from Crush or Gulp to Winter Tundra redirect to outside Ripto. - This is content cut from the vanilla release. - Add Item Groups (Moneybags Unlocks, Level Unlocks, Gems) and Location Groups (Speedways, Speedway Orbs, Gemsanity (per level)) - Add option for player to choose number of gems per Gemsanity bundle (thanks to @garmo1968)
Changes - Split Abilities and Warps option into 2 options - Split Gemsanity Option into 4 (type of checks, location of items, type of items, number of gems per gemsanity bundle) - Rename "Moneybags Unlock - Door to Aquaria Towers" to "Moneybags Unlock - Wall by Aquaria Towers" - Improve Options Creator user experience - Swim is no longer automatically forced to sphere 1. Some way to leave early Summer Forest will be in logic early based on tricks and settings. - Duckstation Client Improvements - Save latest successful connect - Inform user on disconnect - Improve readability - Improve command system - use !help to see commands - Implement Received Items tab - Remove spaces around host and slot name (not password!)
Bug Fixes - Fix bug where client could freeze when sending goal - Fix bug where orb and gem requirement for 10 Tokens goal was not enforced - Fix bug where Moneybags items or full gemsanity gems could desync - Fix bug with Easy Bombo where 3 copies appeared at once

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.7.0
entry.content:
- **Adds the fantastic Archipelago plant graphic by groundpork!** - Adds optional **"Tile Unlock"** items - if enabled, you must receive each individual tile on the lawn as an item before you can plant on it. You'll have to modify your strategy to accommodate for what tiles you have available! As this feature is not yet heavily tested, it's recommended you enable it with caution. - Adds optional **"Progressive Sun Capacity"** items. If enabled, the amount of sun that you can carry at once will be restricted based on the number of these items that you have received. You will start with the ability to only carry a maximum of 150 sun at once. - Adds **zombie weight randomisation**. This affects how frequently different zombie types will be selected to spawn during a level's waves. - Adds **Ring Link support** for sun. - Adds a **"Zombie Shuffle"** trap - when received, all zombies on the lawn change lanes. - Adds an optional **"Mass Zombie Freeze"** filler item - when received, all zombies on the lawn are instantly frozen. - Adds a **"Zen Garden Sprout"** filler item that can appear if Zen Garden is enabled. - Adds an option to replace the "Crazy Dave's Car Keys" and "Twiddydinkies Restock" items with a unified **"Progressive Twiddydinkies"** item. - Increased the maximum number of shop items that can be enabled from 64 to 96. - Generating a world with more items than locations will now result in additional wave locations being created, instead of causing an error. - Fixed a bug where Imitater was left out of item generation. - Fixed a bug where Peashooters, unlike other pea plants, did not have their projectiles correctly randomised. - Fixed a bug where Zen Garden sprouts dropped by zombies could display incorrectly. - Fixed a bug where the option to sell plants in Zen Garden wouldn't appear. - Fixed a bug where per-level music randomisation wouldn't apply correctly if certain level types were disabled. - Fixed non-determinism in generation. (Thanks gerbiljames!)
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: Muse Dash v1.5.32
entry.content:
# Changes - Fixed updating song select songs during gameplay, if a location was collected out. Thanks to @Galaa974. - This happened during another person's collect usually. Common in the big async. - Update songs to DASH AND SHOOT. (Ongeki Collab)
# Installation ## Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
> You can find Muse Dash's folder by finding the game in your steam library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*.
### Windows 1. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.exe` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 3. Click install. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Linux 1. Navigate to Muse Dash on steam, open properties and add the following to Launch Options: `WINEDLLOVERRIDES="version=n,b" %command%` 2. Download `MelonLoader.Installer.Linux` from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. - You may need to give it permissions to execute. 3. Select Muse Dash in the list of games. - If Muse Dash does not appear, click add game manually then browse to `MuseDash.exe`. 4. Click install. On first run, melonloader may install dotnet 6 in order to run. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.7.2**
### Mod Install 1.Download `ArchipelagoMuseDash.zip`. 2. Head to the Muse Dash folder and open up `/mods/`. If this folder does not exist, run the game and it should appear. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. Ensure the files are not in a subfolder, this mod is not setup for that yet. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v73
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.1
entry.content:
This release is fully compatible with seeds generated by v1.4.0.
# Fixes
When reloading the Cantina to change Qui-Gon/Obi-Wan to unlocked characters, fix being able to pick Qui-Gon/Obi-Wan for both characters.
Fix Chapter Requirements Display not working when starting a session for an in-progress multiworld from the existing save file.
Fix entering a Chapter door, cancelling, and then re-entering causing "Story" to be selected instead of Free Play.
# Changes
Small updates to the documentation that were missed in v1.4.0.

entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!

entry.title: shapez 2 v1.0.1
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Fixed UT rejecting any slot
### Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots? Manual-like client yes, back to 0.99.0 (will be deprecated soon though) UT will probably be inaccurate for worlds generated prior to 1.0.0

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.4
entry.content:
Changes:
- Bugfix: Fix a regression in deferred entrances - Bugfix: Correct a logic bug with the Sandwich item's location
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Ori and the Will of the Wisps v0.5.4
entry.content: - Fix non-deterministic issues with region and combat requirements. - Fix the combat logic being wrong sometimes (and in a non-deterministic way). - The trap items in shops should now use the filler icon instead of a random one.

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.5.0
entry.content: - Re-added random music. - Random music can now be re-randomized or toggled off while playing. - When random music is enabled, a popup will appear when a new randomized song starts playing. This can be disabled in the options. - Added counts for weapons and secret weapons to the act summary.

entry.title: Okami HD v0.3.3
entry.content:
# Okami HD APWorld 0.3.3
## What's Changed * Cherry pick old fixes by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/14 * fix Python 3.11 Type generic by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/15 * Generation compatibility for client v0.7.X by @Axertin in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/13 * Better rules by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/16 * Client 0.7.1 compat by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/17
## New Contributors * @Axertin made their first contribution in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/13
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.3.1...0.3.3

entry.title: YARG v0.0.14
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for YARG Official Setlist Wave 15
## What's Changed * Added YARG Setlist Wave 15 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/31
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.13...0.0.14

entry.title: CrossCode v0.8.2
entry.content:
## Changes to Mod
* Added several sanity checks when connecting to the server, including (@CodeTriangle): * was the world generated with a future version of the apworld? * is the game's seed the same as the one this game was previously connected to? * is the game's slot number the same as the on this game was previously connected to?
## Fixes to Mod * Fixed an issue where all but the first instance of disconnection from the login dialog would erroneously notify the player of an unplanned disconnection (@CodeTriangle).

entry.title: CrossCode v0.9.0rc1
entry.content:
## Additions
* Added support for **Botanics** (@CodeTriangle): * If enabled, acquiring all the information about each plant by collecting drops is a location. * Enable the `botanity` option to use this feature. * Along with this, you can also change how many plants are required to complete **Crocus Pocus** and the three intermediary locations. * Added support for the **A New Home** expansion (@kumquat-ir): * Chests, quests, cutscenes, and shops added by the DLC are all now available as potential locations. * Enable the `enable_dlc` option to use this feature. * A new goal has been added (`diorbis`) that requires the player to descend Ku'lero Temple.
## Migration Guide
I **do not** recommend migrating to this release if you started your save file on 0.8.x or earlier.

entry.title: Ratchet & Clank 3 v0.5.3
entry.content:
## RaC3 APWorld v0.5.3 **Branch:** staging **Date:** 2026-04-25 15:02 UTC
📜 Summary (269 changes since v0.5.2) - RAC3: Make nanotech exp filler scale with your current nanotech exp rather than being random (05d09171d) - RAC3: Make vendor messages less likely to get eaten (b0ed043e0) - RAC3: Add min/avg/max in cycle benchmark in rac3_info (0f303800e) - RAC3: Added Arena tag to Phoenix: Return after winning Grand Prize Bout check (e722215a3) - RAC3: Adjust the default filler and trap weights to more closely fitting with the needs of the vendor update (2b617f70d) - RAC3: Rename skin to player skin (7eba16f70) - RAC3: Rename Player EXP to Nanotech EXP, yaml cleanup. (d2f5bcd31) - RAC3: Add a 1 second grace period to deathlink (c88c837b1) - RAC3: Let the user know that death link is off if it is off when using /kill (5a24572f8) - RAC3: Fix Pulsing Purple and Obani Orange being swapped (407e29ac8) - RAC3: Allow US GH version to use NTSC patches (55f674d1b) - RAC3: Remove most debug logs that run every cycle (202fcae3c) - RAC3: Remove spammy debug log statements (8af7ad8c7) - RAC3: Run Ruff Formatter (57ecff777) - RAC3: Remove the no tyhrraguise phoenix thing (a7e2d231e) - RAC3: Adjust Sasha Pos and Range failsafe (d18c5bf0e) - RAC3: Add failsafe for Meet Sasha Bridge (34c5c75f0) - RAC3: Make deathlink kill rules more strict (4054285f2) - RAC3: Make deathlink toggle message white (f89d6bd03) - RAC3: Add the number 38 to all items purchased message (fb38e5866) - RAC3: Fix deathlink on/off message using default theme (846a58bcd) - RAC3: Add softlocked as a death reason to deathlink (b379231a8) - RAC3: Add average cycle time to /rac3_info (aaaacbe16) - RAC3: Add /ryno output to ingame notifications (19fc0b01d) - RAC3: Remove potential confusion about all items purchased (6eb43ca97) - RAC3: Use RAC3POSITIONDATA for distance checks (4078ca5fd) - RAC3: Don't even attempt to apply PAL patches on NTSC and vice versa (44eb1fe94) - RAC3: Refactor patches again (f4a884000) - RAC3: Cleanup no longer used status constants (bb3232c45) - RAC3: Formatting (6bfbe0d28) - RAC3: Added Active Patches to rac3_info (18b2db834) - RAC3: Normalize hurt/damaged state names (1bf3880e6) - RAC3: Use constant from version rather than hard coded magic number (de9613ca9) - RAC3: Let the user know that they have purchased all items in the ship vendor if they have done so (c4a99002d) - RAC3: Fix type hinting on scout_vendors (d9b151aa5) - RAC3: Clean up new AN Vidcomic 2 fix (d833b49a9) - RAC3: Refactor: Player Action and Action Type (e1b0d371a) - RAC3: Fix holostar warning causing next notification to also be 8 seconds (d117c4de8) - RAC3: Hide the vid comic when paused (f653c1d83) - RAC3: Use is_location_checked to ensure it still works even with AN off (d7f7d3e62) - RAC3: Give the player vid comic 2 while on AN if they have completed first challenge (5c7297a6c) - RAC3: Implement logic fixes and suggestions (255377320) - RAC3: Update location names to match new price curve (8115a99f8) - RAC3: Made ship skins start price 14k instead of 10k (28707c927) - RAC3: Mention PAL in the setup guide and add a section for charge boots in the FAQ (eac523a50)\n- ...and 69 more commits.
**Full changelog and compare**: https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/compare/v0.5.2...v0.5.3 ### [Setup Guide](https://github.com/Taoshix/Archipelago-RaC3/blob/staging/worlds/rac3/docs/setup_en.md) ### Notes This release was automatically generated from the **staging** branch. Latest (main) releases are recommended, as pre-releases (staging) may contain experimental or in-progress changes. ### If a location is broken and does not get sent out Go to the server console (locally or via the Archipelago room page) and run: `/send_location ` Example: `/send_location TaoshiRaC3 "Crash Site: Infobot: Aridia"`

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.1.5
entry.content:
Big thanks to @Enderdraak (CosmicWolf) most of this update (and discovering the bugs that I also fixed in this update) They have not only managed to refactor the whole of the factorio ap mod produced by the world (for future adaptability and hopefully debuggability) they have implement Technology Obscurity, local item handling and obtained new icons made by Ruby3440 and then modified further by myself and CosmicWolf to replace the generic archipelago ones.
I'm still working on the apworld I've just been busy recently and getting burned out working on the 3rd recipe engine.
# Changelog: - Refactored the mod done by @Enderdraak - Added Technology Obscurity by @Enderdraak - Makes it so only next technologies are visible and hinted if tech tree information is enabled with configurable depth - Added local item handling by @Enderdraak - Enables easier solo games - Changed the uses of the AP logo to a factorio styled version - Implemented by @Enderdraak and designed by Ruby3440 - Added an Icon to all progressive items by @Enderdraak - Technology tree shapes now use seeded random - Is it UT compatible now? - Readded grenade trap item preventing a generator crash with option - Gets used so little CosmicWolf only recently noticed I forgot to add the item - `is_valid_first_pool` option in facpacks are now actually used again

entry.title: Corn Kidz 64 v0.0.6
entry.content:
- Added Ally Picture Check - **Multiple Goals** can now be selected - Note: the option was also renamed from `goal` to `goal_selection` - Added new option **Switchsanity** - This adds the 4 Switches for the door to Dog God in Some Other Place to item/location pool - Added new option **Test Cubesanity** - This adds the 25 Test Cube from the Test Zone to item/location pool - Div. logic fixes: - Fixed zoo rat 2 requirements - Fixed VoidScrewHollowSky missing Slam requirement - Fixed MirrorHollowZooSideCrank requirement - Fixed CubeParkSlide requirement - Fixed MonsterParkHouseFoyer access requirements - Fix some UT issues - Added archipelago.json - Switched to Rule Builder
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.5...v0.0.6

entry.title: Bloons TD6 v0.6.0
entry.content: - Added Upgrade Sanity Option - Logic for pop tier checks behind locked upgrades added

entry.title: Scooby-Doo! Night of 100 Frights v1
entry.content:
# QOL Fix Release
- Fixes some logic issues in DaSK regarding backtracking without springs - Fixes Memory Reads in Cower in the Tower causing level to lock up

entry.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies v0.5.1
entry.content:
Mod update only, no apworld update
- Origins: - Exit teleporters are now restored - QoL: After all staffs are placed, all 3 giants will have a hatch until the g-strike hole is blown open - Player Save Additions: - Has Shovel / Golden Shovel / Golden Helmet - Number of spots dug - Streak of bad dig rewards (3 losses means next dig spot is 100% a win) - **Note:** Zombie Blood Dig Spots with Golden Shovel will currently not be restored - Locked wallbuys now show a neon red padlock symbol over them

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.6.0
entry.content:
### Changes - Add Traplink support to the AP World - Add in 61 new traps, totalling traps to 71. Considering reducing/genericizing traps in the future, as many traps are similar in scope (summoning enemies, changing tempo, etc.) - Add in sending apworld version number to the mod for easy reference when connected (mod now shows this in the bottom left instead of "AP Connected". - Support sending server commands from the Redux mod (used to just support plaintext messaging) - Store CotND goal completion data in data storage as opposed to allowing the mod to consider goal progression on location checks - Multiply default TrapWeights weights by 10 for decimal weight support
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16908543
entry.content:
### Requires Archipelago 0.6.7! #### This is a prerelease which means that bugs have probably made a home in this build!
Hot Dog! Another big update!
See more information about this mod (bugs, workarounds, configs, etc) in the [Cuphead channel](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1497318235438186566) in the Archipelago Discord.
*Note: Some YAML settings have changed format, check your yaml!*
WARNING: This is in alpha, just be aware that bugs do live in things that are in alpha!
**NOTE: This is not compatible with any apworld version older than alpha03 including prelease versions of alpha03!**
### What's new in alpha03?
- Rewritten logic! - Better Logic! - Chalice logic with double jump is implemented! - Partial hard logic (it works, but only a handful of stuffs has harder logic. More to come!) - Yet Another Project Restructure with cleaner logic code and better maintainability. (geek stuffs) - Universal tracker support! - Support for not starting with a weapon. - Lots of Logic and APWorld bugs fixed! - Even more!
Have fun, and take care!

entry.title: TOEM: A Photo Adventure v2.0.5
entry.content:
Changes:
- No client mod change from 2.0.4 - Bugfix: Prevent occasionally generating an impossible Basto ER
Randomizer details: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/en_TOEM.md Setup guide: https://github.com/bbernardoni/Archipelago/blob/toem/worlds/toem/docs/setup_en.md

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v75
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.2): * reorder headhunters for progressive order * new oasis ramp * option to remove locations: story quests or side quests * option to remove easily missable locations * 30% Omnd-Omnd-Ohk spawn rate in hunters grotto and scyllas grove * get talon of god check to send * allow selection of multiple goals * BAR Challenge checks toggleable by type (region-based or general) * include_locations option * in-game option to disable loot collision * assassinate the assassins always repeatable (easier to do Compl33tionist) * spawn more enemies in windshear waste (easier to do a bunch of combat challenges) * gear items/locations renamed: `VeryRare SMG` -> `License: VeryRare SMG` and `VeryRare SMG Found`

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.7.1
entry.content:
- Fixes inaccuracies with Universal Tracker. - Fixes a crash that could occur when playing ZomBotany.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Phantom Hourglass v0.9.1a0
entry.content:
Compatible with seeds generated in v9.0+ [Setup Guide](https://github.com/carrotinator/Archipelago/blob/main/worlds/tloz_ph/docs/setup.md)
- Fixed crash from improper traveling ship entrance rando assignment - Phantom Hourglass item now has a model - Prevented ship items from giving a free cannon - Fixed Cyclone Slate not sending, and added extra safety just in case - Tried something to fix the Oshus softlock - Fixed crash from reloading client in rooms with close chest reads - Prevented client from trying to remove non-existent boss key actors - Added killing goron chus with just hammer to glitched logic - Added more precise stage flag setting, skipping panning cutscenes on new islands consistently and preventing eye beast fight on first ocean visit - Warp to start no longer cancels randomly on exiting the collection screen - Drinking potions during the Bellumbeck fight no longer sends the goal
